mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, artist, image_url, tuning, capo, bpm, is_public, practice_status, instrument, style, memo, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_score (user_id, title, artist, image_url, tuning, capo, bpm, is_public, practice_status, instrument, style, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{artist}, #{imageUrl}, #{tuning}, #{capo}, #{bpm}, #{isPublic}, #{practiceStatus}, #{instrument}, #{style}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_score WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_score WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_score SET practice_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE t_score SET title = #{title}, artist = #{artist}, tuning = #{tuning}, capo = #{capo}, bpm = #{bpm}, is_public = #{isPublic}, instrument = #{instrument}, style = #{style}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
